'''Dagbats''', also known as '''Dagles'''<ref name="Instructions">{{WebCite|url=https://archive.org/details/super-star-wars-the-empire-strikes-back-usa-rev-1|text=''Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' Instruction Booklet|work=The Internet Archive|nobackup=1}}</ref>, were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of winged creatures native to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].<ref name="SEMP" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dagbats were first seen in 1991's [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1991 video game)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' video game]], and named in the game's manual.<ref name="NES Instructions">{{WebCite|url=http://www.digitpress.com/library/manuals/nes/Star%20Wars%20-%20The%20Empire%20Strikes%20Back.pdf|text=''The Empire Strikes Back'' instruction manual|work=Digital Press|archivedate=20190728181057}}</ref> A different, more elaborate version of the creature was seen in ''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''. That game's manual called it a "Dagle", but a [[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets|guide]] to that game used "Dagbat" again.

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''
*[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1991 video game)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' video game (1991)]] {{1st}}
